args.query:
SELECT REPLACE(TRIM(o.OwnerId),'#','') AS OwnerId, AVG(DATE_DIFF('day', CAST(o.CreatedDate AS DATE), CAST(c.CompanySignedDate AS DATE))) AS avg_days
FROM Opportunity o
JOIN Contract c ON REPLACE(TRIM(o.ContractID__c),'#','') = REPLACE(TRIM(c.Id),'#','')
WHERE CAST(o.CreatedDate AS DATE) BETWEEN DATE '2023-04-01' AND DATE '2023-04-30'
  AND c.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY OwnerId
ORDER BY avg_days ASC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT REPLACE(TRIM(o.OwnerId),'#','') AS OwnerId, AVG(DATE_DIFF('day', CAST(o.CreatedDate AS DATE), CAST(c.CompanySignedDate AS DATE))) AS avg_days
FROM Opportunity o
JOIN Contract c ON REPLACE(TRIM(o.ContractID__c),'#','') = REPLACE(TRIM(c.Id),'#','')
WHERE CAST(o.CreatedDate AS DATE) BETWEEN DATE '2023-04-01' AND DATE '2023-04-30'
  AND c.CompanySignedDate IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY OwnerId
ORDER BY avg_days ASC
LIMIT 1;
